scripts.dev: bun run kill-ports && concurrently "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:client" "bun run dev:worker" --names "SERVER,CLIENT,WORKER" --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold" --kill-others-on-fail
scripts.build: bun run build:server && bun run build:worker && bun run build:client
scripts.typecheck: concurrently "bun run --cwd apps/server typecheck" "bun run --cwd apps/client typecheck" "bun run --cwd apps/worker typecheck"
scripts.test: concurrently "bun test --cwd apps/server" "bun test --cwd apps/worker" "bun test --cwd packages/billing" "bun test --cwd packages/provider" "bun test --cwd packages/shared" --names "SERVER,WORKER,BILLING,PROVIDER,SHARED" --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgYellow.bold,bgRed.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgCyan.bold"
scripts.test:all: bun run test && bun run test:client
scripts.test:coverage: bun run test --coverage && bun run test:client -- --coverage
